_comment: OPERATOR-SUPPLIED LOCAL FILE (test copy, IMPLEMENTATION-014D) -- IREN readings with ema200 / vwap / pct_above_ema21 deliberately ABSENT: the EMA Stack, VWAP and Overextension subagents have no reading and must surface explicit missing-indicator gaps (never computed from nothing). The directory also has NO file for other watchlist tickers, so a requested ticker becomes a visible missing-file gap. Deterministic.
